title: Why Are Shop Vac Bags So Expensive? The Real Reason Nobody Tells You
excerpt: Shop vac bags feel overpriced for what they are — and they kind of are. Here's the real reason, the business model behind it, and what a year of bags actually costs your crew.

title: Do You Need a Bag in a Shop Vac? (When You Do, When You Don't)
excerpt: You don't always need a bag in a shop vac — but skip it on the wrong job and you'll pay for it in clogged filters and a strained motor. Here's the straight answer for each kind of mess.

title: The 5 Best Shop Vac Bags for Drywall, Concrete, and Fine Dust
excerpt: We ranked the shop vac bags contractors actually run on fine dust — by suction retention, fitment, motor protection, and real cost over a year. Four are disposables you keep rebuying. One you buy once.
